description: Visualize catalytic residue conservation showing Ag_PGRPLC lacks key zinc-binding residues for amidase activity
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

# ===== Summary of catalytic residue analysis =====
# Known catalytic residues for zinc-dependent N-acetylmuramoyl-L-alanine amidase activity:
# Position 1: His (zinc ligand 1) - from HH motif
# Position 2: Tyr (zinc hydrate coordination / catalytic)
# Position 3: His (zinc ligand 2)
# Position 4: Cys (zinc ligand 3) - critical thiol zinc ligand

# Results from alignment (mapping via Dm_PGRP_LB reference: H59, Y95, H169, C177)

data = {
    'Protein': [
        'Dm_PGRP_LB\n(catalytic)',
        'Dm_PGRP_SC1b\n(catalytic)',
        'Hs_PGLYRP2\n(catalytic)',
        'Ag_PGRPLC\n(TARGET)',
        'Dm_PGRP_LC\n(receptor)',
        'Dm_PGRP_SA\n(receptor)',
        'Dm_PGRP_LE\n(receptor)',
    ],
    'H_zinc1': ['H', 'H', 'H', 'A', '-', 'H', '-'],
    'Y_cat': ['Y', 'Y', 'Y', 'Y', 'Y', 'Y', 'Y'],
    'H_zinc2': ['H', 'H', 'H', 'H', 'S', 'G', 'H'],
    'C_zinc3': ['C', 'C', 'C', 'S', 'F', 'S', 'S'],
}

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(12, 8))

residue_labels = ['His (Zn ligand 1)', 'Tyr (catalytic)', 'His (Zn ligand 2)', 'Cys (Zn ligand 3)']
keys = ['H_zinc1', 'Y_cat', 'H_zinc2', 'C_zinc3']
expected = ['H', 'Y', 'H', 'C']

# Create grid
n_proteins = len(data['Protein'])
n_residues = len(residue_labels)

for i, protein in enumerate(data['Protein']):
    for j, key in enumerate(keys):
        residue = data[key][i]
        exp = expected[j]
        
        # Color coding
        if residue == exp:
            color = '#2ecc71'  # green - conserved
        elif residue == '-':
            color = '#95a5a6'  # gray - gap
        else:
            color = '#e74c3c'  # red - substituted
        
        rect = plt.Rectangle((j, n_proteins - 1 - i), 0.9, 0.8, 
                             facecolor=color, edgecolor='black', linewidth=1.5)
        ax.add_patch(rect)
        
        # Add residue text
        fontweight = 'bold' if 'TARGET' in protein else 'normal'
        ax.text(j + 0.45, n_proteins - 1 - i + 0.4, residue, 
               ha='center', va='center', fontsize=16, fontweight='bold',
               color='white')

# Labels
ax.set_xlim(-0.5, n_residues + 0.5)
ax.set_ylim(-0.5, n_proteins + 0.5)

# Y-axis: protein names
for i, protein in enumerate(data['Protein']):
    fontweight = 'bold' if 'TARGET' in protein else 'normal'
    color = 'red' if 'TARGET' in protein else 'black'
    ax.text(-0.1, n_proteins - 1 - i + 0.4, protein, 
           ha='right', va='center', fontsize=10, fontweight=fontweight, color=color)

# X-axis: residue labels
for j, label in enumerate(residue_labels):
    ax.text(j + 0.45, n_proteins + 0.2, label, 
           ha='center', va='bottom', fontsize=10, fontweight='bold', rotation=0)

# Expected residues at top
for j, exp in enumerate(expected):
    ax.text(j + 0.45, n_proteins + 0.0, f'(expected: {exp})', 
           ha='center', va='bottom', fontsize=8, color='gray')

# Legend
green_patch = mpatches.Patch(color='#2ecc71', label='Conserved (catalytic)')
red_patch = mpatches.Patch(color='#e74c3c', label='Substituted (non-catalytic)')
gray_patch = mpatches.Patch(color='#95a5a6', label='Gap / not aligned')
ax.legend(handles=[green_patch, red_patch, gray_patch], loc='lower right', fontsize=10)

# Dividing line between catalytic and non-catalytic
ax.axhline(y=n_proteins - 3 - 0.1, color='blue', linewidth=2, linestyle='--', alpha=0.5)
ax.text(n_residues + 0.3, n_proteins - 1.5, 'CATALYTIC\nPGRPs', 
       ha='center', va='center', fontsize=9, color='blue', fontweight='bold')
ax.text(n_residues + 0.3, n_proteins - 5.0, 'NON-CATALYTIC\nRECEPTORS', 
       ha='center', va='center', fontsize=9, color='blue', fontweight='bold')

ax.set_axis_off()
ax.set_title('Zinc-Binding Catalytic Residues in PGRP Family\n'
            'Ag_PGRPLC (A7UTA1) lacks critical H→A and C→S substitutions',
            fontsize=14, fontweight='bold', pad=20)

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('pgrp_catalytic_residues.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("\nKey finding: Ag_PGRPLC has A (not H) at zinc ligand 1 and S (not C) at zinc ligand 3")
print("This pattern matches known non-catalytic receptor PGRPs, not catalytic amidases")
print("Conclusion: GO:0008745 (N-acetylmuramoyl-L-alanine amidase activity) is OVER-ANNOTATED")
